ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "workclass" TEXT /* Work class of the individual (e.g., State-gov, Self-emp-not-inc) */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the individual (e.g., Bachelors, HS-grad) */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Number of years of education */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual (e.g., Never-married, Married-civ-spouse) */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual (e.g., Adm-clerical, Exec-managerial) */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the individual (e.g., Not-in-family, Husband) */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the individual (e.g., White, Black) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the individual (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gain of the individual */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital loss of the individual */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Hours worked per week */,
  "native_country" TEXT /* Native country of the individual */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary range of the individual (e.g., <=50K, >50K) */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the individual */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the individual */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential address of the individual */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Geolocation latitude coordinate */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Geolocation longitude coordinate */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., census, survey) */,
  "data_entry_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was entered into the system */,
  "data_update_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the quality of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_occupation FOREIGN KEY ("occupation") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_native_country FOREIGN KEY ("native_country") REFERENCES native_countries ("native_country_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_salary FOREIGN KEY ("salary") REFERENCES salaries ("salary_range"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_race FOREIGN KEY ("race") REFERENCES races ("race_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_sex FOREIGN KEY ("sex") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_marital_status FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_workclass FOREIGN KEY ("workclass") REFERENCES workclasses ("workclass_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_relationship FOREIGN KEY ("relationship") REFERENCES relationships ("relationship_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_education FOREIGN KEY ("education") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_level_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "workclasses" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work class */,
  "workclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the work class (e.g., State-gov, Self-emp-not-inc) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the work class */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry associated with the work class */,
  "industry_description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the work class data */,
  "data_entry_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the work class data was entered into the system */,
  "data_update_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the work class data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level (e.g., Bachelors, HS-grad) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study for the education level */,
  "field_of_study_description" TEXT /* Description of the field of study */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the education level data */,
  "data_entry_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the education level data was entered into the system */,
  "data_update_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the education level data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status (e.g., Never-married, Married-civ-spouse) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  "marriage_date" TEXT /* Date of marriage, if applicable */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the marital status data */,
  "data_entry_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the marital status data was entered into the system */,
  "data_update_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the marital status data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation (e.g., Adm-clerical, Exec-managerial) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry associated with the occupation */,
  "industry_description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the occupation data */,
  "data_entry_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the occupation data was entered into the system */,
  "data_update_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the occupation data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "relationship_name" TEXT /* Name of the relationship (e.g., Not-in-family, Husband) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  "family_size" INTEGER /* Size of the family */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the relationship data */,
  "data_entry_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship data was entered into the system */,
  "data_update_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the relationship data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race (e.g., White, Black) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity associated with the race */,
  "ethnicity_description" TEXT /* Description of the ethnicity */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the race data */,
  "data_entry_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the race data was entered into the system */,
  "data_update_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the race data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sex */,
  "gender_identity" TEXT /* Gender identity of the individual */,
  "gender_identity_description" TEXT /* Description of the gender identity */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the sex data */,
  "data_entry_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sex data was entered into the system */,
  "data_update_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the sex data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "native_countries" (
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each native country */,
  "native_country_name" TEXT /* Name of the native country (e.g., United-States, Cuba) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the native country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent of the native country */,
  "continent_description" TEXT /* Description of the continent */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the native country data */,
  "data_entry_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the native country data was entered into the system */,
  "data_update_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the native country data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("native_country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary range */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range (e.g., <=50K, >50K) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the salary range */,
  "annual_salary" INTEGER /* Exact annual salary */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the salary data */,
  "data_entry_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the salary data was entered into the system */,
  "data_update_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the salary data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the access log data */,
  "data_entry_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log data was entered into the system */,
  "data_update_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the access log data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)
